description: Silicon rectifier diode — conducts when anode is above cathode by Vf

grid.css: border-radius: 2px 0 0 2px; border: 1px solid #333; border-right: none; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #c0c0c0 0%, #c0c0c0 50%, #141414 50%, #141414 100%);

border-radius: 0; border-top: 1px solid #333; border-bottom: 1px solid #333; border-left: none; border-right: none; background: linear-gradient(180deg, #222 0%, #141414 28%, #141414 100%); cursor: pointer;
border-radius: 0 2px 2px 0; border: 1px solid #333; border-left: none; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #141414 0%, #141414 50%, #c0c0c0 50%, #c0c0c0 100%);
